_doc: Provenance manifest for the future RoofVault Field Wisdom exam bank. Maps each Field Wisdom question id (e.g. 'FW-001') to its source transcript, timestamp, and (optionally) a short quote. Authored manually as questions are created. This file is content/QA-only: it is NOT loaded by /api/exam and must NOT be required from runtime code. Move/rename only with care — the field_wisdom-question-bank-2026.js (future) and any QA tooling will reference these transcript file names exactly.

speaker.name: Joe Sorrentino
speaker.consentNote: Transcripts authorized for proprietary RoofVault exam-content derivation.

2026-03-cost-effectiveness-coatings-vs-s.originalFileName: Joe Sorrentino on Cost Effectiveness Coatings vs Single-Ply.txt

2026-04-ccs-influencer-joe-sorrentino.tx.topic: Strategies for selling fluid-applied systems to skeptics
themes: common objections from owners and consultants

questionId.quote: <optional short verbatim excerpt for traceability; keep brief>

FW-001.quote: Adding reinforcements to liquid materials puts it in that category of a roofing membrane.

FW-002.quote: I call it the personality of the roof. If we have a large open area, the benefits of large sheets ... start to take away some of the advantages ... within coating systems.

FW-003.quote: When you think you've asked enough questions, what should be the next thing that you do? Ask some more questions.

FW-004.quote: Taking care of your roof and more importantly, having a proactive look at life cycle costs will allow you to look at performances of 20 to 30 to 40 years.

FW-005.quote: The biggest issues that we have in non-believers is not bringing to them specifically the issues they have on their roof and showing conditions that have been successfully done.
